overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple interior with hieroglyphic reliefs and burning braziers, then transitioning to an outdoor flooded ruin complex with colossal statues and the Pyramid of Amenemhat III visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow temple corridor with hieroglyphic reliefs and burning braziers

agents.ego_description: ascending stone stairs through the narrow corridor toward the lit doorway at the end

entered.detail: tall stone walls with carved hieroglyphic reliefs running along both sides
wall-mounted fire bowls providing warm flickering illumination
ancient Egyptian carvings and symbols covering the corridor walls
stone steps leading upward toward a brightly lit doorway

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a narrow stone corridor illuminated by burning braziers, with hieroglyphic reliefs covering the walls on both sides, approaching a brightly lit doorway at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctuary chamber with triad statues and ceremonial altar

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large inner sanctuary chamber with three colossal statues
character slows and turns to examine wall murals and the central statues

agents.ego_description: walking around the sanctuary examining the triad statues and detailed wall paintings, approaching a kneeling figure near the altar

notable_agents.action: kneeling in prayer or meditation before the ceremonial altar

entered.detail: three large dark statues standing against the back wall of the chamber
raised platform with burning candles and offerings placed before the statues
colorful painted reliefs depicting Egyptian gods and pharaohs
raised stone seating or ceremonial platform along the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand sanctuary featuring three colossal statues against the far wall, with ceremonial offerings and candles arranged on the floor. A kneeling figure prays near the altar as the character explores the chamber, examining detailed wall murals depicting Egyptian deities and symbols.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded temple courtyard with colossal statues and pyramid view

events.description: hard cut transition from indoor temple to outdoor flooded ruins with bright daylight
text overlay 'Pyramid of Amenemhat III' appears at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water between ancient ruins and colossal statues toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: massive stone pharaoh statues seated on thrones flanking the waterway
calm reflective water covering the ground up to the character's knees
tall ancient pillars lining the approach to the temple entrance
the Pyramid of Amenemhat III visible in the distant background
construction scaffolding against the temple walls indicating restoration work

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an outdoor flooded archaeological site where the character wades through water surrounded by massive ancient statues and temple ruins. The Pyramid of Amenemhat III is visible in the distance as the character approaches a temple entrance flanked by colossal seated pharaoh statues and tall stone columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a torch-lit temple into a vast, flooded archaeological landscape. It begins by ascending a narrow stone corridor where burning braziers cast flickering light upon walls covered in dense hieroglyphic reliefs. As the character passes through a brightly lit doorway, the space expands into a grand sanctuary featuring colossal statues, ceremonial offerings, and detailed murals of Egyptian deities. The scene then shifts from the enclosed interior to an outdoor ruin complex, where the character wades through shallow water amidst massive fallen statues. Finally, the view opens up to reveal the Pyramid of Amenemhat III in the distance as the camera approaches a temple entrance flanked by towering seated pharaohs and stone columns.
